title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Grofers Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Grofers Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Grofers Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Grofers Advisory Limited:
Grofers Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
